title: Repair Kits
description: A mod that adds items that can repair tools on-the-go.
body:
![Repair Kit Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/phNrl0Ux/images/033b4ae05789dd22d0d5200c80a9830723581778.png)
A simple mod that adds items that allow you to repair your tools from any crafting inventory.
> ![Image of the repair kits](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/phNrl0Ux/images/7a3a1e7750b6c3603ec44352416e8bf9274cd0c7.gif)

Simply add the relevant kit and the item you want to repair to any crafting slots and your durability will be instantly reset!
> ![Use in any crafting menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/phNrl0Ux/images/8e0dcf42fd6ad56f3f35f66112f021b0cdc91ac7.png)

Using a repair kit will not remove any custom data from the repaired item!
> ![An image showing the a sword being repaired using a repair kit that keeps its enchantment and custom name](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/phNrl0Ux/images/8a840a991c4219ac3986d72f97d46cc9fc7f3b11.png)

There are three types of kit: Armor, Tool and Weapon. You'll have to use the right kit for the item you'd like to repair. 
> ![An image showing an elytra being repaired by an armor repair kit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/phNrl0Ux/images/e62a9f2fef9505638b07b9e24c36bce84408c8ff.png)

This mod does not add a way to obtain these items, it is recommended that they are added via a source like custom villager trades (which can be confiured [using this mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/villagerconfig), for example)
